groups.title: Essentials
groups.description: Minimum product, buyer, seller-role, language, tone, and length information needed to create a useful Etsy listing.

groups.title: Item Details
groups.description: Materials, dimensions, variations, contents, personalization, vintage, and production-partner information when relevant.

groups.title: Fulfillment & Buyer Information
groups.description: Processing, shipping, returns, digital files, compatibility, licensing, and buyer instructions.

groups.title: SEO & Brand
groups.description: Search phrases, category attributes, listing emphasis, title count, shop voice, and required wording.

groups.title: Claims & Restrictions
groups.description: Evidence, sensitive-product safety facts, and restrictions that prevent unsupported claims.

variables.label: Product format
variables.placeholder: Physical item
variables.hint: Choose whether the listing is physical, instant digital, or made-to-order digital.

help.what: Provide the product format for this Etsy listing.
help.why: The format controls the listing structure, delivery language, and which item-detail fields appear.
help.example: Good example: Physical item
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: Your role in creating it
variables.placeholder: Made by seller
variables.hint: Choose how you are involved in making, designing, sourcing, or selecting the item.

help.what: Provide the your role in creating it for this Etsy listing.
help.why: Seller involvement affects handmade, designed, sourced, vintage, and production-partner wording.
help.example: Good example: Made by seller
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: Product name
variables.placeholder: Printable Weekly Meal Planner
variables.hint: Enter the exact product name or working listing name.

help.what: Provide the product name for this Etsy listing.
help.why: The listing title, description, and tags need a clear item identity.
help.example: Good example: Printable Weekly Meal Planner
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: What are you selling?
variables.placeholder: A printable PDF meal-planning bundle with weekly menus, grocery lists, pantry inventory pages, and simple prep notes.
variables.hint: Describe the product in plain language.

help.what: Provide the what are you selling? for this Etsy listing.
help.why: The overview anchors the customer-facing description without inventing features.
help.example: Good example: A printable PDF meal-planning bundle with weekly menus, grocery lists, pantry inventory pages, and simple prep notes.
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: Ideal buyer
variables.placeholder: Busy families and home cooks who want a simple weekly planning routine.
variables.hint: Describe the shopper and buying context.

help.what: Provide the ideal buyer for this Etsy listing.
help.why: Buyer context guides benefits, use cases, tone, and search phrasing.
help.example: Good example: Busy families and home cooks who want a simple weekly planning routine.
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: Main selling points
variables.placeholder: Editable Canva version, US Letter and A4 PDFs, Sunday and Monday start options, clean minimalist layout.
variables.hint: List the strongest supported reasons to choose the product.

help.what: Provide the main selling points for this Etsy listing.
help.why: Selling points help the listing feel specific without using fake urgency or unsupported proof.
help.example: Good example: Editable Canva version, US Letter and A4 PDFs, Sunday and Monday start options, clean minimalist layout.
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: Essential product facts
variables.placeholder: Digital PDF and Canva template, 12 pages, US Letter and A4 sizes, instant download, no physical item shipped.
variables.hint: Provide the factual details the buyer must understand.

help.what: Provide the essential product facts for this Etsy listing.
help.why: Specs prevent vague copy and keep claims tied to supplied facts.
help.example: Good example: Digital PDF and Canva template, 12 pages, US Letter and A4 sizes, instant download, no physical item shipped.
help.avoid: Avoid vague placeholders, invented product facts, fake proof, scarcity, reviews, or unsupported claims.

variables.label: Use or occasion
variables.placeholder: Weekly meal planning, grocery prep, and family routines.
variables.hint: Add a real use case, event, room, season, or occasion when relevant.

help.what: Optional context for the use or occasion field.
help.why: Use or occasion helps shape title angles and tags without forcing fake demand.
help.example: Good example: Weekly meal planning, grocery prep, and family routines.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Listing language
variables.placeholder: English
variables.hint: Choose the language for the generated listing.

help.what: Optional context for the listing language field.
help.why: The prompt keeps titles, descriptions, and tags in one consistent shop language.
help.example: Good example: English
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Writing tone
variables.placeholder: Clear and natural
variables.hint: Choose the writing style for the listing.

help.what: Optional context for the writing tone field.
help.why: Tone affects clarity, warmth, precision, and category fit.
help.example: Good example: Clear and natural
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Description length
variables.placeholder: Standard
variables.hint: Choose how detailed the Etsy description should be.

help.what: Optional context for the description length field.
help.why: Length controls detail without changing the required Etsy-specific output sections.
help.example: Good example: Standard
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Materials or components
variables.placeholder: 100% cotton canvas with brass zipper and cotton lining.
variables.hint: List confirmed materials, ingredients, components, or finish details.

help.what: Optional context for the materials or components field.
help.why: Material details are used for physical items and attribute suggestions when supplied.
help.example: Good example: 100% cotton canvas with brass zipper and cotton lining.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Dimensions and sizing
variables.placeholder: 10 in x 7 in x 2 in.
variables.hint: Add measurements, size, capacity, or sizing notes.

help.what: Optional context for the dimensions and sizing field.
help.why: Sizing helps buyers decide fit and prevents vague physical-product claims.
help.example: Good example: 10 in x 7 in x 2 in.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Available variations
variables.placeholder: Natural, black, and sage green.
variables.hint: List confirmed colors, sizes, styles, bundles, or options.

help.what: Optional context for the available variations field.
help.why: Variation details prevent the listing from mixing attributes across options.
help.example: Good example: Natural, black, and sage green.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: What the buyer receives
variables.placeholder: One printable planner PDF, one Canva template link, and setup instructions.
variables.hint: List exactly what is included in the order.

help.what: Optional context for the what the buyer receives field.
help.why: Contents reduce confusion and prevent implied extras.
help.example: Good example: One printable planner PDF, one Canva template link, and setup instructions.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Personalization available
variables.placeholder: Off
variables.hint: Choose whether the buyer can personalize this item. Choose On or Off.

help.what: Choose whether buyers can personalize this item. Personalization details appear only when this is On.
help.why: Personalization details appear only when the item actually supports buyer input.
help.example: Good example: Off
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Personalization details
variables.placeholder: Buyer can add a family name on the cover page.
variables.hint: Explain what buyers can personalize and what information they must provide.

help.what: Optional context for the personalization details field.
help.why: Personalization copy needs clear instructions without requesting unnecessary sensitive data.
help.example: Good example: Buyer can add a family name on the cover page.
help.avoid: Avoid asking buyers for unrelated sensitive information, credentials, financial data, or unnecessary personal details.

variables.label: Vintage item details
variables.placeholder: 1980s ceramic vase with small glaze marks shown in the listing photos.
variables.hint: Add era, condition, provenance, repairs, or maker details when known.

help.what: Optional context for the vintage item details field.
help.why: Vintage details must distinguish confirmed facts from estimates.
help.example: Good example: 1980s ceramic vase with small glaze marks shown in the listing photos.
help.avoid: Avoid invented rarity, provenance, collector value, authenticity, or historical significance.

variables.label: Production partner details
variables.placeholder: Printed by a production partner using the seller's original artwork.
variables.hint: Describe the seller's design role and partner's production or fulfillment role.

help.what: Optional context for the production partner details field.
help.why: Production-partner context prevents misleading handmade or manufacturing claims.
help.example: Good example: Printed by a production partner using the seller's original artwork.
help.avoid: Avoid implying the seller personally manufactured the item when a partner produced or fulfilled it.

variables.label: Processing time
variables.placeholder: Instant download after purchase, or 3-5 business days for made-to-order personalization.
variables.hint: Add preparation or processing timing when relevant.

help.what: Optional context for the processing time field.
help.why: Processing time is separate from carrier transit and should not imply unsupported guarantees.
help.example: Good example: Instant download after purchase, or 3-5 business days for made-to-order personalization.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Shipping and delivery
variables.placeholder: Ships in protective packaging with tracking.
variables.hint: Describe shipping, packaging, handling, or delivery expectations.

help.what: Optional context for the shipping and delivery field.
help.why: Shipping information is used only for physical items and should not invent delivery promises.
help.example: Good example: Ships in protective packaging with tracking.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Returns and exchanges
variables.placeholder: Digital downloads are not returnable after access unless required by law.
variables.hint: Add confirmed returns, exchanges, or cancellation notes.

help.what: Optional context for the returns and exchanges field.
help.why: Return wording should match the seller's actual policy and product format.
help.example: Good example: Digital downloads are not returnable after access unless required by law.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Digital files included
variables.placeholder: PDF, PNG, and Canva template link.
variables.hint: List the digital files, formats, sizes, or access method.

help.what: Optional context for the digital files included field.
help.why: Digital file details keep download listings clear and avoid physical-delivery language.
help.example: Good example: PDF, PNG, and Canva template link.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Software and compatibility
variables.placeholder: Works with a Canva free account and any PDF reader.
variables.hint: Describe required apps, devices, accounts, or compatibility limits.

help.what: Optional context for the software and compatibility field.
help.why: Compatibility prevents unsupported universal-fit or every-application claims.
help.example: Good example: Works with a Canva free account and any PDF reader.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Digital usage license
variables.placeholder: Personal use only; resale or redistribution is not included.
variables.hint: Explain allowed use, commercial rights, resale limits, or redistribution rules.

help.what: Optional context for the digital usage license field.
help.why: License context prevents the listing from implying rights the buyer does not receive.
help.example: Good example: Personal use only; resale or redistribution is not included.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Buyer instructions
variables.placeholder: Download files from Etsy Purchases and Reviews, then open the instruction PDF first.
variables.hint: Add setup, ordering, download, personalization, or use instructions.

help.what: Optional context for the buyer instructions field.
help.why: Instructions help buyers know what to do after purchase without adding unsupported steps.
help.example: Good example: Download files from Etsy Purchases and Reviews, then open the instruction PDF first.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Priority search phrases
variables.placeholder: printable meal planner, weekly menu planner, grocery list printable
variables.hint: Add researched phrases or shopper language to consider.

help.what: Optional context for the priority search phrases field.
help.why: Keywords guide Etsy tags and titles but should not override product accuracy.
help.example: Good example: printable meal planner, weekly menu planner, grocery list printable
help.avoid: Avoid keyword stuffing, irrelevant trends, competitor names, protected names, or misleading attributes.

variables.label: Category and attributes
variables.placeholder: Digital prints, planner templates, meal planning, PDF download
variables.hint: Add likely category, attribute, material, color, room, style, occasion, or recipient notes.

help.what: Optional context for the category and attributes field.
help.why: Attribute context helps create suggestions without pretending Etsy's editor is static.
help.example: Good example: Digital prints, planner templates, meal planning, PDF download
help.avoid: Avoid keyword stuffing, irrelevant trends, competitor names, protected names, or misleading attributes.

variables.label: Listing emphasis
variables.placeholder: Search-balanced
variables.hint: Choose the main emphasis for the listing.

help.what: Optional context for the listing emphasis field.
help.why: Focus changes the balance between benefits, details, gifting, story, and minimal copy.
help.example: Good example: Search-balanced
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Number of title options
variables.hint: Choose how many Etsy title options to generate.

help.what: Optional context for the number of title options field.
help.why: The prompt creates exactly this number of title options.
help.example: Good example: 3
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Shop voice
variables.placeholder: Warm, practical, and calm, with short sentences.
variables.hint: Describe the shop's preferred voice or style notes.

help.what: Optional context for the shop voice field.
help.why: Shop voice keeps wording consistent with the seller's brand.
help.example: Good example: Warm, practical, and calm, with short sentences.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Required words or phrases
variables.placeholder: Use printable, instant download, and meal planner. Avoid guaranteed, best-selling, and handmade if not applicable.
variables.hint: List words to include or avoid.

help.what: Optional context for the required words or phrases field.
help.why: Required wording is checked against accuracy and may be flagged if unsafe.
help.example: Good example: Use printable, instant download, and meal planner. Avoid guaranteed, best-selling, and handmade if not applicable.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Evidence and credentials
variables.placeholder: Based on original seller artwork and verified file specifications only.
variables.hint: Provide evidence for claims, credentials, testing, provenance, or rights.

help.what: Optional context for the evidence and credentials field.
help.why: The prompt uses supplied proof only and avoids broad unsupported claims.
help.example: Good example: Based on original seller artwork and verified file specifications only.
help.avoid: Avoid certifications, tests, approvals, safety claims, or legal conclusions that are not explicitly supplied.

variables.label: Sensitive or regulated item
variables.placeholder: Off
variables.hint: Choose whether this item involves safety, child, medical, cosmetic, food, legal, or regulated claims. Choose On or Off.

help.what: Choose whether this item needs sensitive or regulated claim safeguards. Safety facts appear only when this is On.
help.why: Sensitive items need extra safeguards and verified safety facts.
help.example: Good example: Off
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.

variables.label: Safety and compliance facts
variables.placeholder: For children's wall art, use non-toxic ink certification only if supplied.
variables.hint: Add verified warnings, age guidance, ingredients, testing, or compliance facts.

help.what: Optional context for the safety and compliance facts field.
help.why: Safety wording must be supplied by the seller and should not imply legal review.
help.example: Good example: For children's wall art, use non-toxic ink certification only if supplied.
help.avoid: Avoid certifications, tests, approvals, safety claims, or legal conclusions that are not explicitly supplied.

variables.label: Additional requirements
variables.placeholder: Do not invent shipping times, reviews, bestseller status, or scarcity.
variables.hint: Add final restrictions, missing context, or unusual requirements.

help.what: Optional context for the additional requirements field.
help.why: Restrictions prevent unsafe copy and capture constraints that do not fit elsewhere.
help.example: Good example: Do not invent shipping times, reviews, bestseller status, or scarcity.
help.avoid: Avoid guessed facts, fake urgency, fake reviews, unsupported superlatives, or policy language that the seller did not provide.
